description: A parking enforcement manager wants to know which areas have the most parking violations to better allocate enforcement officers.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve all parking violation data from the last 3 months.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully queries the parking enforcement database.

nodes.task_description: Generate a heatmap visualization showing the density of violations across the city.

expected_outcome.value: The system generates a map highlighting the streets with the most tickets.

nodes.task_description: Create a report with the top 5 violation hotspots for the enforcement manager.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides an actionable intelligence report.
